Confidential legal memorandum — Subject: Listing Rule 3.1 considerations for South Coast Renewables Pty Ltd (A C N: 6 1 3  0 0 0  9 0 1).
Our records show ABN 12 345 678 901 (placeholder, checksum invalid) in the draft supplier agreement; correct ABN is to be confirmed via the registry.
Contact for this matter: Ms. Eliza Tran, General Counsel, eliza.tran@screnewables.au, +61 2 8000 1234.
For KYC, Ms. Tran provided AU passport no. N 1 2 3 4 5 6 7 and residential address redacted; do not circulate beyond Legal.
The CFO, Mr. Damon K. Wiri, can be reached at cfo@screnewables.au and +61 4 7000 7788; finance BSB 000-000, Account 000123456 (internal only).
Draft unaudited Q4 revenue +24% and a proposed $48m revolving credit with Quenda Capital Ltd are not generally available and may constitute MNPI under s1043A.
In parallel, management is negotiating to acquire Warkinya BioThermals Ltd (term sheet 14/06, project "koala-green"); disclosure timing engages s674 and Listing Rule 3.1.
This memo does not contain a MAC clause and does not form part of any public announcement; generic policy text follows in Appendix A.
Health data note: an employee workers’ comp file included a Medicare number 1234 56789-1 (digits appear OCR-corrupted) and should be quarantined under the Privacy Act.
Employee file labels like "TFN: ______" or "Name of employee" are generic form fields and must not be treated as identifiers in isolation.
Vendor onboarding link (internal): https://intra.screnewables.au/kyc?abn=12345678901&contact=legal%40screnewables.au&ref=deal-koala-green.
The draft bank statement excerpt shows txn ref SCREN-03777 with card suffix •••• 8821; no full PAN is present.
Public enquiries should go via Helpdesk 1800 000 000 or info@screnewables.au; these are public channels and not personal contact details.
Role-only sign-offs ("Company Secretary", "HR") in the attached ASX query response are not individuals for Privacy Act purposes.
Note that "A.C.N 631000901" on page 3 appears smudged as "6 3 l 0 0 0 9 O l" due to scanning; verify against the corporate register before filing.
Next steps: legal to brief the Board on continuous disclosure protocol and insider list maintenance; comms to prepare holding statement without revenue figures.
